'''Negus Nigekus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Brigian]] colonist on [[New Brigia]] who was killed when the [[Yevetha]] attacked the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].
